features.label: Features
features.title: From scattered sources to decision-ready reports
features.description: A focused research workspace for people who need credible business analysis without starting from a blank page.

core.title: Search-grounded research
core.description: Aireseach uses platform-managed Jina search to collect public context before the model writes.

ai.title: Bring your own model key
ai.description: Use OpenAI, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Perplexity, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint without exposing platform model spend.

mobile.title: Investment-grade structure
mobile.description: Reports include metrics, evidence, market share, competitive pressure, antifragility, and risks.

extension.title: Exportable output
extension.description: Download Markdown reports for memos, client notes, pitch prep, or internal strategy work.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Teams ship faster with us
testimonials.description: Hear from founders and developers who customized the starter to launch sooner and convert better.

jack.name: Jack
jack.body: The starter freed our team from boilerplate work. We swapped in our copy over a weekend and focused on features customers actually wanted.

jill.name: Jill
jill.body: We launched our MVP in two weeks. Everything from marketing pages to auth was ready—we just rewrote the copy for our audience.

john.name: John
john.body: The DX is unmatched. The stack works out of the box and stays flexible enough to shape around our product narrative.

sarah.name: Sarah
sarah.body: We scaled from prototype to thousands of users without drama. Analytics, billing, and marketing flows were ready to customize.

mike.name: Mike
mike.body: The community is stellar. Fast answers, launch feedback, and constant improvements keep our team moving.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Have a question? We got answers
faq.description: Find answers to frequently asked questions about features, pricing, implementation, and getting started with our platform.

whatDoesOurPlatformDo.question: What does our platform do?
whatDoesOurPlatformDo.answer: Aireseach generates structured business research reports from live search context and the model provider you choose.

howWillThisBenefitMyBusiness.question: How will this benefit my business?
howWillThisBenefitMyBusiness.answer: You launch faster, ship features sooner, and convert more leads because the core product, analytics, and billing flows are already in place.

isMyDataSafe.question: Is my data safe?
isMyDataSafe.answer: Yes. We follow enterprise-grade security practices and provide guardrails so you can adapt policies to your industry requirements.

whatKindOfIntegrationsAreAvailable.question: What kind of integrations are available?
whatKindOfIntegrationsAreAvailable.answer: The report workflow supports OpenAI, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Perplexity, and custom OpenAI-compatible model endpoints.

howEasyIsItToOnboardMyTeam.question: How easy is it to onboard my team?
howEasyIsItToOnboardMyTeam.answer: Your team can dive in quickly with clear docs, TypeScript-first patterns, and examples that show exactly where to customize.

whatTypesOfBusinessesCanUseThis.question: What types of businesses can use this?
whatTypesOfBusinessesCanUseThis.answer: Founders, analysts, consultants, investors, and operators can use Aireseach to speed up repeatable market and company research.

canICustomizeThisToFitMyBusinessNeeds.question: Can I customize this to fit my business needs?
canICustomizeThisToFitMyBusinessNeeds.answer: Absolutely. Every module is designed for quick customization—update copy, swap components, and extend logic without fighting the framework.
